content.body:
Adds cli/internal/cmd/bootstrap.go with the full leo bootstrap command:
--path, --refresh, --dry-run, --commit-depth, --max-file-size, --scope
flags. Writes drafts to .leo/memory/ as JSON files with provenance,
confidence, and promotion_state. Emits a CaptureEvent via transponder.

Integrates into leo init onboarding (Group 7 bootstrap question). Non-
interactive -y always skips bootstrap. Exports DraftHash from cartographer
for ID generation. Updates onboarding tests for the new form group.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add leo bootstrap command and leo init integration
